AI for Business

Productivity, automation, analytics. AI tools that actually move the needle for business.

Quick Comparison

Tool Maker Rating Price Best For
ChatGPT Team/Enterprise OpenAI ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.3 $25-60/user/mo Best for teams already using ChatGPT
Claude for Business Anthropic ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.4 $25-50/user/mo Best for nuanced analysis and long documents
Notion AI Notion ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.0 $10/mo add-on Best for Notion-native teams
Canva AI (Magic Studio) Canva ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.2 $13/mo Non-designers making decent graphics fast
Zapier AI (Canvas) Zapier ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 3.9 From $20/mo Workflow automation that thinks, not just links
Microsoft Copilot for Business Microsoft ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 4.1 $30/user/mo Best for Microsoft 365 organizations
